name: Baked Beef with Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 large tart apple, pared and chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a heavy skillet.
2. Add salt and pepper to the browned beef.
3. Mix the beef with sour cream and milk.
4. Cook the herb stuffing mix and apple in 1/4 cup of meat drippings or butter for 5 minutes.
5. Add water to the mixture.
6. Spread half of the beef mixture into a 2-quart baking dish.
7. Top with stuffing mix.
8. Press gently on top.
9. Spoon the remaining meat over the top.
10. Bake at 300°F for 30 minutes.
